body.title: Restore Igor fallback goal tree — boredom/idle standing goals
body.result: Restored three STANDING goals: read codebase, read queue, read web. Modified goal_continuation to push STANDING goals to TWM.
body.description:
Igor has no STANDING or STRATEGIC goals in the DB. When no TACTICAL goal is active, goal_continuation finds nothing and the NE spins on a deduped 'Identify and set new goals' impulse. The fallback goal tree has been lost.

Restore three STANDING goals (goal_active=true, never auto-closed):
1. Read and learn from Igor's own codebase (wild_igor/)
2. Read from the existing reading/book queue
3. Find and read free content on the web

Also verify goal_continuation checks for STANDING goal_type when no TACTICAL goal is active — if the code only looks at TACTICAL, it needs a fallback branch.

**Affected files:** clan.memories (DB insert, 3 rows), wild_igor/igor/cognition/goal_continuation.py (verify/patch fallback branch)
**Design rules:** none — data restoration + defensive code check
**Scope boundary:** insert standing goals + verify continuation logic picks them up. No new goal types.
**Test plan:** after insert, confirm ring_memory shows goal_continuation adopting a standing goal within one NE cycle instead of spinning
